description_long: This is a military combat tactical vehicle with a boxy, armored body and a camouflage paint scheme. The vehicle features a reinforced front grille, a roof-mounted weapon system, and a spare tire attached to the rear. Its windows are small and likely bullet-resistant, with protective metal bars on the sides. The exterior displays various military markings, including a large star emblem on the hood, a radiation symbol on the rear, and unit numbers on the doors. The tires are rugged and designed for off-road use, and the vehicle is equipped with multiple hatches and handles for entry and access. The overall build suggests a focus on durability, protection, and tactical utility in urban environments.
description: Armored military vehicle with camouflage paint, roof-mounted weapon, and rugged off-road tires. Features include reinforced body, military markings, and a spare tire on the rear.
description_view_0: Front view shows the reinforced grille, large star emblem on the hood, and small, armored windows.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the side doors, off-road tires, roof-mounted weapon, and spare tire on the rear roof.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the spare tire, radiation symbol, rear hatches, and armored panels.
description_view_3: Right side view reveals similar features to the left, including side doors, unit number, and visible weapon mount.
attribute_weapon_mounts: One visible roof-mounted machine gun mount located centrally on the roof.
attribute_armor_plating: Full body visible armor plating with reinforced panels on the front, sides, and rear; appears thick and robust with sloped surfaces for deflection.
attribute_camouflage_pattern: Woodland camouflage pattern with irregular patches of green, brown, black, and beige.
attribute_military_markings: Large star emblem on the hood, radiation symbol on the rear, unit number '11' on both side doors, small flag on the front and rear corners, and black chevron on the rear sides.
attribute_tire_type: Four large off-road tires with deep, rugged tread pattern; one spare tire mounted on the rear roof.
